transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I was given a cashback offer by your front desk last visit — something about a loyalty programme. I didn't get any cashback. Who do I contact?
AGENT: I'm sorry for the confusion. Could I get your name and visit date?
CALLER: Rohini Apte. Last visit was 3rd of this month.
AGENT: Let me check the loyalty programme record... I can see your visit but the cashback credit hasn't been applied. I'll flag this to our billing and patient relations team today. They'll review and credit it within 3 working days.
CALLER: How will I receive the credit?
AGENT: It'll be credited to your loyalty wallet in our app, which you can use on your next visit. If you're not on the app, I can request they process it as a direct discount on your next bill.
CALLER: I'm on the app. Wallet credit is fine.
AGENT: Perfect. Escalated. You'll be notified when the credit is added. Sorry for the delay, Rohini ji!
